architectureDiagram:
graph TD
    subgraph Client_Layer
        WebApp[Web Application React]
        MobileApp[Mobile App React Native]
    end
    subgraph API_Gateway_Layer
        Gateway[Kong API Gateway]
        WAF[Web Application Firewall]
    end
    subgraph Microservices_Layer
        AuthSvc[Authentication Service]
        AccSvc[Account Service]
        TxnSvc[Transaction Service]
        AnalyticSvc[Analytics Service]
        CardSvc[Card Management Service]
    end
    subgraph Data_Layer
        UserDB[(User DB PostgreSQL)]
        TxnDB[(Transaction DB MongoDB)]
        Cache[(Redis Cache)]
    end
    subgraph External_Systems
        CoreBanking[Core Banking System]
        MLEngine[ML Insights Engine]
    end
    WebApp --> WAF
    MobileApp --> WAF
    WAF --> Gateway
    Gateway --> AuthSvc
    Gateway --> AccSvc
    Gateway --> TxnSvc
    Gateway --> AnalyticSvc
    Gateway --> CardSvc
    AuthSvc --> UserDB
    AuthSvc --> Cache
    AccSvc --> CoreBanking
    AccSvc --> Cache
    TxnSvc --> TxnDB
    TxnSvc --> CoreBanking
    AnalyticSvc --> MLEngine
    AnalyticSvc --> TxnDB
componentDiagram:
graph TD
    AppRoot[App Root] --> AuthProvider[Auth Provider]
    AuthProvider --> Router[App Router]
    Router --> DashboardLayout[Dashboard Layout]
    DashboardLayout --> Sidebar[Navigation Sidebar]
    DashboardLayout --> Topbar[Global Topbar]
    DashboardLayout --> MainContent[Main Content Area]
    MainContent --> NetWorthWidget[Net Worth Hero Widget]
    MainContent --> AccountGrid[Account Cards Grid]
    AccountGrid --> AccountCard[Account Card Component]
    AccountCard --> SparklineChart[Sparkline Trend Chart]
    MainContent --> TxnHistory[Recent Transactions Panel]
    MainContent --> SpendingAnalytics[Spending Analytics Chart]
    MainContent --> QuickActions[Quick Actions Panel]
    QuickActions --> TransferModal[Transfer Funds Modal]
erDiagram:
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ACCOUNT : owns
    USER ||--o{ CARD : holds
    USER ||--o{ LOAN : liable_for
    ACCOUNT ||--o{ TRANSACTION : contains
    USER {
        uuid id PK
        string email
        string password_hash
        boolean mfa_enabled
        datetime last_login
    }
    ACCOUNT {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        string account_type
        string masked_number
        decimal current_balance
        decimal available_balance
        string currency
    }
    TRANSACTION {
        uuid id PK
        uuid account_id FK
        decimal amount
        string type
        string category
        datetime timestamp
        string description
    }
    CARD {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        string card_type
        string masked_pan
        string status
        datetime expiry
    }
    LOAN {
        uuid id PK
        uuid user_id FK
        decimal principal_amount
        decimal outstanding_balance
        decimal interest_rate
        datetime next_payment_date
    }
sequenceDiagram:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant C as Client App
    participant G as API Gateway
    participant A as Auth Service
    participant Acc as Account Service
    participant An as Analytics Service
    
    U->>C: Enter Credentials & Biometrics
    C->>G: POST /api/v1/auth/login
    G->>A: Validate Credentials
    A-->>G: MFA Challenge Required
    G-->>C: 401 MFA Required
    U->>C: Provide OTP / Biometric Scan
    C->>G: POST /api/v1/auth/mfa
    G->>A: Verify MFA Token
    A-->>G: JWT Access Token
    G-->>C: 200 OK (Token)
    
    par Fetch Dashboard Data
        C->>G: GET /api/v1/accounts
        G->>Acc: Fetch Accounts
        Acc-->>G: Account List & Balances
        G-->>C: 200 OK (Accounts)
        
        C->>G: GET /api/v1/analytics/net-worth
        G->>An: Calculate Net Worth
        An-->>G: Net Worth Data & Trend
        G-->>C: 200 OK (Net Worth)
    end
    
    C->>U: Render Dashboard (under 800ms)
componentStructure: AppRoot: Initializes context providers (Theme, Auth, Redux/Zustand store, React Query).
AuthGuard: Higher-order component ensuring routes are protected and MFA is validated.
DashboardLayout: CSS Grid/Flexbox shell managing the Sidebar, Topbar, and Main Content areas.
SidebarNavigation: Collapsible vertical menu with glassmorphic active states and micro-interactions.
GlobalTopbar: Contains global search, notification bell with unread badge, and user profile dropdown.
NetWorthHero: High-impact visual component displaying total aggregated wealth with a dynamic, glowing trend line.
AccountGrid: Responsive CSS Grid container mapping over user accounts to render AccountCards.
AccountCard: Individual card showing masked account number, current/available balance, and embedding the SparklineChart.
SparklineChart: Lightweight SVG/Canvas component rendering a 30-day balance trend line using D3 or Recharts.
TransactionPanel: Container for recent transactions, featuring filtering and sorting capabilities.
TransactionItem: Row component displaying transaction icon (based on category), description, date, and formatted amount.
SpendingAnalytics: Donut chart or bar chart component visualizing ML-driven spending categories.
QuickActionsBar: Horizontal list of icon buttons for rapid tasks (Transfer, Pay Bills, Freeze Card).
TransferModal: Multi-step modal with fluid transitions for executing internal or external fund transfers.
NotificationToast: Absolute positioned, animated toast system for success/error feedback.
wireframes:
UX STRATEGY & EXHAUSTIVE WIREFRAMES

1. GLOBAL LAYOUT & NAVIGATION
The Nexus Dashboard utilizes a 'Modern Obsidian' theme. The background is a deep, rich black (#0A0A0C) with subtle, ambient radial gradients in deep indigo and emerald to indicate active zones. 
- Sidebar (Left): A frosted glass panel (rgba(20, 20, 25, 0.6)) with a 1px solid border of rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Contains sleek, minimalist icons for Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Analytics, Cards, and Settings. Hovering over icons triggers a fluid, spring-physics expansion revealing text labels.
- Topbar (Top): Sticky header. Left side features a personalized greeting ('Good evening, Alexander'). Right side houses a biometric-secured profile avatar, a notification bell with a pulsing neon-cyan dot for unread alerts, and a global command palette search bar (Cmd+K) with a blurred backdrop.

2. DASHBOARD HERO: NET WORTH & LIQUIDITY
- Position: Top of the main content area.
- Visuals: A massive, elegant typography display using 'Outfit' font. 'Total Net Worth' in subtle gray, with the value '$1,245,890.50' in stark white, glowing slightly. 
- Interaction: Below the number is a fluid, interactive area chart spanning the full width of the hero section. The chart uses a gradient fill from Neon Cyan to transparent. Hovering over the chart scrubs through historical net worth data, updating the main number dynamically with a smooth counter animation.

3. ACCOUNT CARDS GRID
- Position: Directly below the Hero section.
- Layout: A responsive CSS Grid (3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile).
- Card Design: Each card represents an account (Checking, Savings, Investment). Cards are dark grey (#121216) with a subtle inner shadow and a 1px border that illuminates on hover. 
- Content: Top-left shows the account name and masked number (e.g., 'Nexus Checking ••4092'). Top-right shows a contextual icon. Center displays the 'Available Balance' in large, crisp 'Inter' font. Bottom spans a 30-day Sparkline chart. If the trend is positive, the line is Emerald Green; if negative, Rose Red. Data loads progressively with a shimmering skeleton state ensuring perceived performance under 800ms.

4. SPENDING ANALYTICS & RECENT TRANSACTIONS
- Layout: A 2-column split below the Account Grid. Left column (40%) for Analytics, Right column (60%) for Transactions.
- Analytics Panel: Features a central Donut Chart with a hollow center displaying 'Total Spent This Month'. Segments are vibrantly colored (Cyan for Tech, Purple for Dining, Orange for Travel). Hovering a segment pops out the slice and displays ML-driven insights ('You spent 15% less on Dining this month').
- Transactions Panel: A sleek list of rows. Each row has a category icon inside a soft-edged squircle, the merchant name, date, and amount. Positive amounts are green with a '+' prefix; negative are white. Infinite scrolling is enabled.

5. QUICK ACTION MODALS (e.g., Transfer Funds)
- Trigger: Clicking 'Transfer' in the Quick Actions bar.
- Visuals: A modal slides up from the bottom (mobile) or fades in with a scale-up effect (desktop). The backdrop is heavily blurred (backdrop-filter: blur(20px)).
- Content: A step-by-step wizard. Step 1: Select 'From' and 'To' accounts using visual card selectors. Step 2: A massive, full-width numeric keypad (on mobile) or large input field (desktop) to enter the amount. Step 3: Swipe-to-confirm slider, ensuring deliberate action. Success state triggers a subtle confetti micro-animation and a satisfying haptic feedback pulse.
apiEndpoints: POST /api/v1/auth/login - Payload: { email, password_hash, device_id }. Response: { mfa_token, requires_mfa: true }
POST /api/v1/auth/mfa - Payload: { mfa_token, code, biometric_signature }. Response: { access_token, refresh_token, user: {} }
GET /api/v1/accounts - Headers: { Authorization: Bearer <token> }. Response: { data: [{ id, type, masked_number, current_balance, available_balance, currency, trend_data: [] }] }
GET /api/v1/accounts/{id}/transactions - Query: ?limit=20&offset=0. Response: { data: [{ id, amount, type, category, timestamp, description }], pagination: {} }
GET /api/v1/analytics/net-worth - Query: ?timeframe=30d. Response: { total_net_worth, currency, historical_data: [{ date, value }] }
POST /api/v1/transfers/internal - Payload: { from_account_id, to_account_id, amount, currency, memo }. Response: { transaction_id, status: 'COMPLETED', timestamp }
designSystem:
NEXUS DESIGN SYSTEM: 'MODERN OBSIDIAN'

1. DESIGN PHILOSOPHY
Elite, hyper-modern, and frictionless. The UI must feel like a high-end financial instrument. We utilize 'Glassmorphism 2.0'—deep dark backgrounds with multi-layered, frosted glass elements, illuminated by vibrant, purposeful accent colors.

2. COLOR PALETTE
- Backgrounds: Obsidian Base (#050507), Surface Level 1 (#0A0A0C), Surface Level 2 (#121216).
- Accents (Neon & Vibrant): Nexus Cyan (#00E5FF) for primary actions and active states. Emerald Green (#00E676) for positive trends/success. Rose Red (#FF1744) for alerts/negative trends. Amethyst Purple (#D500F9) for AI/ML insights.
- Typography Colors: Primary Text (#FFFFFF), Secondary Text (#8F9098), Disabled/Muted (#55575E).

3. TYPOGRAPHY
- Headings & Display: 'Outfit' (Geometric, sleek, modern). Used for Net Worth, Account Balances, and Hero titles. Weights: 400, 600.
- Body & UI Elements: 'Inter' (Highly legible, precise). Used for transaction lists, metadata, and labels. Weights: 400, 500.

4. SPACING & BORDERS
- Grid System: 8px baseline grid. Standard paddings: 16px (compact), 24px (standard), 32px (relaxed).
- Border Radius: 16px for large panels (Cards, Modals), 8px for buttons and inputs, 50% for avatars and circular icons (Squircles preferred for app-like feel).
- Borders: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) on all elevated surfaces to define edges against dark backgrounds.

5. SHADOWS & BLURS (GLASSMORPHISM)
- Ambient Glow: box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.05);
- Elevation Shadow: box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
- Backdrop Blur: backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%); used on Topbar, Sidebar, and Modals.

6. MICRO-ANIMATIONS & TRANSITIONS
- Physics: Spring-based animations (stiffness: 300, damping: 30) for all hover states and modal entrances.
- Interactions: Buttons scale down to 0.95 on active/click. Skeletons use a subtle, angled shimmer effect (linear-gradient at 45deg) moving at 1.5s intervals.
